title: [codereview-pass1] Kconfig: LICHEN_COAP_DEADDROP help text incomplete, missing rate limit/DTN specifics, OSCORE init dependency not documented
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/Kconfig:260 - New option added but does not reference subsystem init order from AGENTS.md or spec for OSCORE before CoAP. Also no mention of DTN storage backend required. P1 correctness.
